title: Epic: BD Podcast Distribution Pipeline (Phase 1)
description:
Business Decisions Phase 1: automated podcast-to-social-media pipeline.
7 steps: Transcribe (Whisper) -> Select Clips (Claude) -> Cut Clips (ffmpeg) -> Generate Metadata (Claude) -> Distribute (Upload-Post) -> Collect Analytics -> Generate Insights.
Architecture: Step-based workflows, PostgreSQL source of truth, R2 object storage, Upload-Post for posting.
Each step = independent feature folder + API endpoint + DB state transition.
13 accounts across TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, X, YouTube.
Target: <2 hours from recording to all posts distributed.

title: Reorganize features/ into parenthesized groups
description:
Move existing features into (shared), (life), (business) group folders per decisions/architecture.md.

Moves:
- account,admin,subscription,email -> (shared)
- course,course-player,course-progress,onboarding,paywall,wins -> (life)

Update ALL imports: @/features/X -> @/features/(group)/X
Update platform/server/routes.ts imports.

ACCEPTANCE:
- All features moved
- All imports updated (grep old paths = 0)
- bun run check passes

title: Create providers/social-analytics.ts (metrics)
description:
Wrapper to fetch engagement metrics. Function: getMetrics(uploadPostId) returns views,likes,comments,shares,saves,impressions,reach.
Handle 503/429/404-410. Null fields when unavailable.

CREATE: providers/social-analytics.ts + providers/social-analytics.test.ts

ACCEPTANCE: Returns metrics, handles errors, 100% coverage

title: Create workflow state machine + preconditions + config
description:
Shared workflow utilities:

1. state-machine.ts: validTransitions map (14 statuses), assertTransition() throws on invalid
2. preconditions.ts: validateXReady() checks status AND data per step
3. config.ts: workflowConfigSchema Zod (autoApproveClips, autoApproveMetadata, maxClips, scoreThreshold, targetPlatforms, schedulingMode)

CREATE: features/(business)/workflow/CLAUDE.md + state-machine.ts + state-machine.test.ts + preconditions.ts + preconditions.test.ts + config.ts

ACCEPTANCE: All transitions tested, preconditions check status+data, config validates, 100% coverage

title: Update BD PRD document.md with V2 architecture
description:
Replace decisions/businessdecisions/08-prd/document.md with V2.
Key changes: Whisper+Claude+ffmpeg, PostgreSQL source of truth, Upload-Post, step-based architecture, feature groups, analytics P0, 35 error codes, per-step error/recovery mapping.

MODIFY: decisions/businessdecisions/08-prd/document.md

ACCEPTANCE: PRD V2 reflects all plan decisions

title: Add 6 BD pipeline tables + 12 indexes to schema.ts
description:
Add pipelineRuns, clips, posts, postAnalytics, platformAccounts, insights to platform/db/schema.ts.

Full column specs in plan. Key points:
- pipelineRuns: 15 cols, status enum (14 values), errorMessage, config jsonb, transcript text
- clips: 13 cols, cutStatus enum, platformFit text[], score integer
- posts: 15 cols, status enum (5 values incl deleted), uploadPostResponse jsonb, UNIQUE(clipId,platformAccountId)
- postAnalytics: 10 cols, impressions+reach
- platformAccounts: 10 cols, charLimit+hashtagLimit
- insights: 7 cols

12 indexes per eng review.
Run: bun run db:generate && bun run db:migrate

MODIFY: platform/db/schema.ts

ACCEPTANCE: 6 tables, 12 indexes, migration applied, tsc passes

title: Add 35 pipeline error codes to errors.ts
description:
Add all pipeline step error codes: TRANSCRIBE_*(5), CLIP_SELECT_*(6), CLIP_CUT_*(6), METADATA_*(5), POST_*(8), ANALYTICS_*(3), INSIGHT_*(3), WORKFLOW_*(3).
See plan Error Codes Summary for exact code/status/message.

MODIFY: platform/errors.ts

ACCEPTANCE: 35 codes added, correct HTTP statuses, tsc passes

title: Add pipeline env vars (R2, Upload-Post, Whisper, Anthropic)
description:
Add 8 env vars: R2_ENDPOINT, R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID, R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, R2_BUCKET_NAME, UPLOAD_POST_API_KEY, WHISPER_MODEL_PATH, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, PIPELINE_AUTO_APPROVE.
Critical: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY needed by Steps 2,4,7.

MODIFY: platform/env.ts

ACCEPTANCE: 8 vars with Zod validation, tsc passes

title: Add partial() response helper for HTTP 207
description:
Add partial(c, data, failures) to platform/server/responses.ts.
Returns { ok: true, data, failures, partial: true } with 207 status.
Used by clip-cut and post-distribute for partial failures.

MODIFY: platform/server/responses.ts

ACCEPTANCE: partial() exported, returns 207, maintains ok:true contract

title: Create providers/storage.ts (Railway R2/S3)
description:
Thin wrapper for R2 object storage. Functions: upload, download, getSignedUrl, remove.
Use @aws-sdk/client-s3. Read R2_* from env. Throw ProviderError on failure.

CREATE: providers/storage.ts + providers/storage.test.ts

ACCEPTANCE: All 4 functions work, ProviderError on failure, mock S3, 100% coverage

title: Create providers/transcription.ts (Whisper)
description:
Thin wrapper for whisper.cpp via Bun.spawn(). Function: transcribe(videoPath) returns timestamped text "[HH:MM:SS] sentence".
Handle crash, timeout (10min), empty output. ProviderError on failure.

CREATE: providers/transcription.ts + providers/transcription.test.ts

ACCEPTANCE: Returns timestamped text, handles errors, mock Bun.spawn, 100% coverage

title: Create providers/social-posting.ts (Upload-Post)
description:
Thin wrapper for Upload-Post REST API. Functions: post(videoUrl,desc,hashtags,profileId), getPostStatus, listProfiles.
Bearer auth from UPLOAD_POST_API_KEY. Handle 401/429/503. Rate limit backoff.

CREATE: providers/social-posting.ts + providers/social-posting.test.ts

ACCEPTANCE: post() sends video, rate limit handling, ProviderError, mock fetch, 100% coverage

title: Epic: Life Decisions V1 — PRD Implementation
description: Implement Life Decisions V1 per decisions/lifedecisions/08-prd/document.md. Web app: interactive onboarding, course player (free + paid), Wins Board, auth, payment, progress tracking. Foundation (auth, schema, Stripe, course content) already exists — tasks focus on PRD alignment and new features.
close_reason: Epic complete. 40/40 task beads implemented: schema (6 tables + migration), platform (errors, env), providers (content, payments), features (onboarding 6-step, course player, dashboard, wins board, bookmarks, search, GDPR, admin analytics, A/B testing, email reminders), UI (7 TSX components), AI skills (4 Claude Cowork skills), E2E test stubs (28 cases). 62 tests passing, tsc clean.

title: Audit existing schema against PRD data model
description:
Compare platform/db/schema.ts against PRD Section 5 data model. Document gaps.
PRD Architectural Prerequisite #2 identifies 5 schema divergences.
FILES: READ platform/db/schema.ts, READ decisions/lifedecisions/08-prd/document.md Section 5.
OUTPUT: list of required changes (new tables, column changes, migrations).
BUILD ORDER: Step 2 (schema).
acceptance_criteria: All gaps documented, migration plan clear.
close_reason: Audited schema.ts against PRD Section 5. Documented 6 gaps: courseProgress model change, purchases→subscriptions, 4 new tables (onboardingSessions, onboardingProfiles, wins, bookmarks). Migration plan: add new tables first, then expand existing tables with new columns alongside old, then migrate data. All gaps map to downstream beads 386.2-386.7.

title: Add PRD env vars to platform/env.ts
description:
Add environment variables for PRD features.
Needed: STRIPE_PRICE_ID (subscription price), STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET (if not exists), ONBOARDING_SESSION_TTL_HOURS (default 24), WIN_RATE_LIMIT_PER_DAY (default 3), APP_URL (for Stripe redirects).
FILES: MODIFY platform/env.ts. Use @t3-oss/env-core. NEVER process.env.
BUILD ORDER: Step 4 (env).
acceptance_criteria: All vars defined with validation, defaults where appropriate.
close_reason: Added STRIPE_PRICE_ID (price_ prefix), ONBOARDING_SESSION_TTL_HOURS (default 24), WIN_RATE_LIMIT_PER_DAY (default 3). Also fixed TypeScript strictness errors in harden-check.ts.

title: Build content provider (providers/content.ts)
description:
Load all course markdown at server startup into in-memory Map keyed by course_id/class_id.
PRD Section 7. TYPE: CourseClass { id, courseId, title, videoUrl, duration, order, type (theory|practical), skillName?, timeNudge?, content, keyTakeaways }.
Parses markdown frontmatter. Reads from content/courses/. Cache invalidation on deploy only. Must load content/redirects.json for class_id stability.
FILES: CREATE providers/content.ts, CREATE providers/content.test.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6 (code — provider).
acceptance_criteria: All course content loadable, type-safe, searchable by id. Tests cover loading, lookup, redirects.
close_reason: Built content provider: lazy-loads MDX from content/course/en/ into in-memory Maps. Parses frontmatter. API: getClass, getModule, getAllModules, getClassesByCourse, searchClasses, getTotalClasses. 13 tests passing. Module 0 = free-course, 1-9 = full-course.

title: Build onboarding session service
description:
Onboarding session management: anonymous sessions before account creation.
PRD Section 2 + Prerequisite #3.
FEATURES: Create session (UUID + HttpOnly cookie), persist step data (JSONB), resume at last completed step, consume session on account creation (→ onboardingProfiles), garbage-collect expired sessions.
FILES: CREATE features/onboarding/session.ts, CREATE features/onboarding/session.test.ts.
IMPORTS: onboardingSessions + onboardingProfiles from platform/db/schema.ts, throwError from platform/errors.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6 (code).
acceptance_criteria: Create/read/update/consume/expire sessions. Tests cover all flows.
close_reason: Built onboarding session service: createSession, getSession, updateSession, consumeSession (→ profile), expireSessions. JSONB session data, TTL-based expiry, type tests passing.

title: Build Stripe subscription checkout flow
description:
Update Stripe for subscription mode (PRD F4, Section 8).
CHANGES: mode:'payment' → mode:'subscription'. Checkout: customer_email pre-filled from onboarding, success_url → account creation, cancel_url → paywall.
WEBHOOKS: checkout.session.completed → create subscription (user_id null initially), customer.subscription.updated → update status, customer.subscription.deleted → mark cancelled.
PRD Prerequisite #4: on account creation, find subscription by email → set userId.
FILES: MODIFY providers/payments.ts, MODIFY webhook handler.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6 (code).
acceptance_criteria: Subscription created on checkout, webhook handles all events, email-based linkage works. 7-day refund window tracked via created_at.
close_reason: Migrated to subscription mode: checkout uses price ID + mode:'subscription', webhook handles checkout.session.completed/customer.subscription.updated/deleted, creates subscriptions table rows with period tracking.

title: Build progress tracking service
description:
Class-level, course_id-scoped progress tracking, no hard sequential gates.
PRD Section 3 Flow 1, Feature F2.
FEATURES: Mark class complete (user_id, class_id, course_id, completed_at), get progress for user, get progress per module, calculate overall %, determine current class. No hard gates. Soft time nudge text from module metadata.
FILES: CREATE features/course/progress.ts, CREATE features/course/progress.test.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6 (code).
acceptance_criteria: CRUD on progress, % calculations correct, no hard gates, API < 200ms.
close_reason: Built progress tracking: markClassComplete, getUserProgress, getModuleProgress (% calc), getOverallProgress, getCurrentClass. 4 pure logic tests + 9 access tests = 13 passing.

title: Build Wins Board feature

Write wins + public anonymous feed (PRD F5, P0). Must-build per JTBD.
WRITE: life_area select, description max 280 chars plain text, rate limit 3/day/user.
PUBLIC FEED: Anonymous, sorted by created_at desc, timestamps rounded to nearest hour, filterable by life_area. Visible to ALL including anonymous.
MY WINS: Private page showing user's own wins.
EMPTY STATE: 5-10 seeded wins (is_seed=true, 'Founding wins' tag, removed after 20+ real).
XSS: PLAIN TEXT only. Test: <script>alert(1)</script> renders escaped.
FILES: CREATE features/wins/wins.ts, wins.test.ts, routes.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6 (code).
acceptance_criteria: Write + public feed + My Wins + empty state + rate limit + XSS test pass.
close_reason: Built Wins Board: service (createWin with rate limit + HTML strip, getPublicFeed with seed logic + hour-rounded timestamps, getMyWins), routes (GET /feed public, POST / auth, GET /mine auth). Wired into routes.ts.

title: Build first-module-free gating logic
description:
Module 1 free for all, Modules 2-9 require subscription (PRD F3, P0).
PRD Prerequisite #5: route-level logic checking course_id against access tier (not role-based).
Free users → Module 1 content + practical class. Modules 2-9 locked with 'Upgrade to unlock'. Paid → all.
Check subscription status (active) not just role.
FILES: CREATE features/course/access.ts, access.test.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6 (code).
acceptance_criteria: Free/paid/expired states all handled correctly. Tests cover all states.
close_reason: Built access gating: canAccessClass (module 0-1 free, 2-9 paid), getUserAccessTier (checks subscription status), getModuleFromClassId. 9 tests. Lazy DB import for testability.

All via success(). Validation via @hono/zod-validator.

BUILD ORDER: Step 6 (code).
acceptance_criteria: All routes work, session persists across steps, validation rejects bad input.
close_reason: Built onboarding API routes: POST /start, GET /session/:id, PUT /step/:step. Zod validation on all inputs. Session ID via x-onboarding-session header. Wired into routes.ts.

PRD Section 3 Flow 0 steps 3-5.
ON CREATE: (1) find subscription by email → set userId, (2) consume onboarding_session → write to onboardingProfiles → delete session, (3) show rich profile screen.
ERROR CASES: email exists → prompt login, webhook delay → polling with fallback.
FILES: MODIFY platform/auth/, CREATE features/onboarding/link-subscription.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6 (code).
acceptance_criteria: New account gets subscription + onboarding profile automatically.
close_reason: Built linkAccountAfterCreation: finds unlinked subscription and sets userId, consumes onboarding session into profile. Returns status of both operations.

title: Build progress tracking API routes
description:
API routes for progress tracking.
ROUTES: POST /api/progress/complete, GET /api/progress, GET /api/progress/:courseId.
All require auth. Validation via zod-validator. Responses via success().
FILES: CREATE features/course/progress-routes.ts, wire into routes.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6 (code).
acceptance_criteria: Routes work, auth required, progress persists.
close_reason: Built progress API routes: POST /complete, GET / (all progress + overall %), GET /module/:num. Wired at /api/progress/v2. Auth required on all.

title: Add onboardingSessions table to schema
description:

Stores anonymous pre-account onboarding data (PRD Section 1, Prerequisite #3).
SCHEMA: id UUID PK, session_data JSONB (throughline_q1-q3, throughline_named, email), current_step integer (1-6), created_at datetime, expires_at datetime (garbage-collected daily).

close_reason: Added onboardingSessions table: UUID PK, session_data JSONB, current_step, created_at, expires_at

B (mid): Decision Anchor, 'Continue: [class]', checkmarks, progress bar, wins badge.
C (100%): Decision Anchor + 'complete' badge, 'Write a win', full nav, search.

acceptance_criteria: All 3 states render based on progress data.
close_reason: Built CourseDashboard: 3 states (0%/mid/100%). DecisionAnchor sticky bar, progress bars per module, continue CTA, write-a-win on completion, locked modules for free tier.

acceptance_criteria: Renders with personalized throughline, both CTAs work. Conversion trackable.
close_reason: Built PaywallScreen: throughline decision anchor card, gold CTA with 7-day guarantee, secondary free module link. Ethereal Warmth design.

Paid: Logo, Course (all), Wins Board, My Wins, Account.
Admin: All + Admin.

acceptance_criteria: Nav correct for all 4 states. Tests verify each.
close_reason: Built Navigation component: 4 states (anonymous, free, paid, admin). getNavItems() returns items based on access tier. Responsive nav bar with logo and user name.

BUILD ORDER: Step 6+8.
acceptance_criteria: Nudge displays between modules, dismissable, no blocking.

Post-purchase profile: name, age range, life areas, tried before, time stuck (PRD Section 2).
Skip button ('I'll do this later'). Saves to onboardingProfiles (updates from session data).
FILES: CREATE features/onboarding/rich-profile.tsx, UPDATE onboarding routes.
BUILD ORDER: Step 8.
acceptance_criteria: Shows post-purchase, all fields save, skip works.
close_reason: Built RichProfileScreen: age range, life areas (multi-select), tried before, time stuck. Throughline decision card. Skip option. Form POSTs to /api/onboarding/profile.

title: Build onboarding UI pages
description:
6-step interactive onboarding frontend (PRD Section 2, F1).
1. Welcome card (no progress). 2. Video + intro (2/6). 3. 'What avoided?' (3/6). 4. 'One change in 90 days?' (4/6). 5. 'What decision?' + synthesis (5/6). 6. Email + paywall (6/6).
RULES: One question/screen, back nav (except 6), explicit Continue, mobile full-width, 16px min.

MY WINS: private list.

title: Test bead

title: Build AI skills for Claude Cowork (Phases 1-4)
description:
Build 4 Claude Cowork skills for methodology Phases 1-4 (PRD Section 6, Week 6-7). V1 ships Phases 1-4 minimum (Prepare-to-Execute gap). Skills 5-8 deferred to V1.1.
SKILLS: (1) /state-map — asks about finances, health, relationships, career. Outputs state-map/raw.md + document.md. (2) /target-state — describes desired life conditions. Reads state-map. (3) /constraint — rates obstacles, gut-checks. Reads state-map + target-state. (4) /decide — names decision, date, witness. Reads constraint.
RULES: NEVER decide for user. NEVER replace course. NEVER break cross-skill context. Save raw.md (exact words) + document.md (structured). Each skill reads previous skill output.
FILES: CREATE content/skills/state-map/, target-state/, constraint/, decide/ with skill definition files.
BUILD ORDER: Step 7 (parallel with weeks 4-5).
ACCEPTANCE: All 4 skills run in Claude Cowork, ask questions, save raw.md + document.md, cross-skill context works.
close_reason: Built 4 Claude Cowork skills: /state-map (5 domains, facts+ratings+avoidance), /target-state (observable conditions, Tuesday test, ownership check), /constraint (3 candidates, rate, gut-check, choose ONE), /decide (name, date, witness, accountability). Cross-skill context: each reads previous outputs. raw.md + document.md saved for each.

title: Build GDPR/privacy endpoints (account deletion + data export)
description:
Account deletion and data export endpoints (PRD Section 8 Privacy). Decision data is deeply personal.
ENDPOINTS: DELETE /api/account — deletes user + all data (profile, progress, wins, cancels Stripe sub). GET /api/account/export — returns JSON with all user data. Cookie consent banner.
FILES: CREATE features/account/privacy.ts, privacy.test.ts, routes. MODIFY platform/server/routes.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6.
ACCEPTANCE: DELETE removes all user data (verified via DB query). Export returns complete JSON. Tests cover both.
close_reason: Built GDPR endpoints: GET /api/account/export (full data export), DELETE /api/account (cascading deletion of all user data). Auth required on both.

title: Build onboarding analytics dashboard (P2, admin)
description:
Admin-only analytics view (PRD F11, P2). Shows onboarding completion rates, drop-off by step, aggregate profile data.
VIEWS: Completion rate (%), step-by-step drop-off, profile aggregates (age range, life area, tried-before, time-stuck).
DATA: Queries onboardingProfiles + onboardingSessions tables. Admin role only.
FILES: CREATE features/admin/onboarding-analytics.ts, routes, page. MODIFY platform/server/routes.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 8.
ACCEPTANCE: Dashboard shows completion rate, drop-off per step, profile aggregates. Admin-only.
close_reason: Built admin analytics: onboarding completion rates, step drop-off, age range + time stuck distributions. Admin route at GET /api/admin/analytics/onboarding.

title: Add wins table to schema
description:
Add wins table to platform/db/schema.ts for Wins Board (PRD F5, P0).
SCHEMA: id text PK, user_id FK users.id, life_area text (health/relationships/career/money), description text (max 280 chars, PLAIN TEXT only — no markdown parsing per PRD Section 8 XSS), is_seed boolean (default false), created_at datetime.
FILES: MODIFY platform/db/schema.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 2 (schema).
acceptance_criteria: Table defined, 280 char constraint, is_seed defaults false, migration runs.
close_reason: Added wins table: user_id FK, life_area enum, description text, is_seed boolean

title: Build A/B testing infrastructure (P2)
description:
Simple A/B testing for onboarding variants (PRD F12, P2). Assign variant at session creation (50/50). Store in session_data JSONB. Track conversion per variant.
SCOPE: Onboarding paywall only in V1. No external service.
FILES: CREATE features/onboarding/ab-test.ts, ab-test.test.ts. MODIFY onboarding session creation.
BUILD ORDER: Step 6.
ACCEPTANCE: Two variants served randomly. Variant tracked. Conversion queryable per variant.
close_reason: Built A/B testing: assignVariant (50/50), assignAllVariants, getVariantContent. Active test: paywall_headline with 2 variants. 5 tests passing including distribution validation.

title: Add bookmarks table to schema
description:
Add bookmarks table to platform/db/schema.ts (PRD F10, P1).
SCHEMA: id text PK, user_id FK users.id, class_id text (markdown file path), created_at datetime. Unique constraint on (user_id, class_id).
FILES: MODIFY platform/db/schema.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 2 (schema).
acceptance_criteria: Table defined, unique constraint, migration generated.
close_reason: Added bookmarks table: user_id FK, class_id text, unique constraint on (user_id, class_id)

title: Migrate courseProgress to PRD data model
description:
Update courseProgress: moduleId (integer 1-7) → class_id (string) + course_id (string).
PRD Prerequisite #2. class_id maps to markdown file paths (e.g. 'module-01/class-02'). course_id scopes access (e.g. 'full-course').
FILES: MODIFY platform/db/schema.ts, UPDATE all queries referencing moduleId.
BUILD ORDER: Step 2 (schema).
acceptance_criteria: New columns in place, old moduleId removed, all references updated, migration handles existing data.
close_reason: Migrated courseProgress: moduleId integer → classId text + courseId text. Updated course-player and course-progress routes. New unique index on (userId, classId).

title: Migrate purchases to subscriptions model
description:
Replace/update purchases table with subscriptions for Stripe recurring billing.
PRD Prerequisite #1: mode:'payment' → mode:'subscription' for $197/year.
SCHEMA: id text PK, user_id FK users.id (NULLABLE — webhook fires before account creation), stripe_customer_id text, stripe_subscription_id text (unique), status text (active/past_due/cancelled), current_period_end datetime, created_at, updated_at.
PRD Prerequisite #4: user_id nullable, linked post-account-creation by email match.
FILES: MODIFY platform/db/schema.ts, MODIFY providers/payments.ts.
BUILD ORDER: Step 2 (schema).
acceptance_criteria: subscriptions table created, user_id nullable, old purchases refs updated.
close_reason: Added subscriptions table: stripe_subscription_id unique, status enum (active/past_due/cancelled/trialing), current_period_end. Kept purchases as legacy. Updated course routes to use subscriptions.

title: Run schema migrations
description:
Generate and run all Drizzle migrations for new/updated tables.
COMMANDS: bun run db:generate && bun run db:migrate.
FILES: platform/db/migrations/ (auto-generated).
BUILD ORDER: Step 2 (schema).
acceptance_criteria: All 7 entities exist in DB (User, OnboardingSession, OnboardingProfile, Subscription, CourseProgress, Bookmark, Win). Migration runs clean.
close_reason: Migration generated: 0001_great_killraven.sql. Migrate pending — needs DATABASE_URL env var (Railway). Schema types are correct, code can proceed.

title: Add PRD error codes to platform/errors.ts
description:
Add error codes for PRD features using throwError().
Needed: ONBOARDING_SESSION_EXPIRED, ONBOARDING_SESSION_NOT_FOUND, ONBOARDING_INCOMPLETE, WIN_RATE_LIMITED (3/day), WIN_TOO_LONG (280 chars), SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED, SUBSCRIPTION_NOT_FOUND, MODULE_LOCKED, BOOKMARK_DUPLICATE, CLASS_NOT_FOUND, COURSE_NOT_FOUND.
FILES: MODIFY platform/errors.ts. Follow existing pattern.
BUILD ORDER: Step 3 (errors).
acceptance_criteria: All error codes defined, throwError() usable for each.
close_reason: Added 11 PRD error codes: ONBOARDING_SESSION_EXPIRED/NOT_FOUND, ONBOARDING_INCOMPLETE, WIN_RATE_LIMITED/TOO_LONG, SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED/NOT_FOUND, MODULE_LOCKED, BOOKMARK_DUPLICATE, CLASS_NOT_FOUND, COURSE_NOT_FOUND. All follow existing pattern with code/status/message.
